name: Long Eaton South

locations.address:
Long Eaton Safer Neighbourhood Teams,
Midland St,
Long Eaton,

description: This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Long Eaton south areas. It belongs to the Long Eaton policing section. On the area's southern boundary lies Sawley, a suburb of the town of Long Eaton, which lies between the two cities of Derby and Nottingham. The Long Eaton South Safer Neighbourhood area covers the two halves of the village - Old Sawley, which is the old village area, and New Sawley, which is mainly made up of a modern residential area called the Dales Estate. The area also cover a huge industrial estate which is known as Acton Road and Trent Lock which is the joining point for several canals and rivers.
